criteria.label: Implementation Effort
criteria.description: Time and resource requirements for system setup, data migration, and staff training.

criteria.label: Integration Capability
criteria.description: Ability to support bi-directional sync with existing SAP ERP and other business tools.

criteria.label: Total Cost of Ownership
criteria.description: Combined annual subscription fees, one-time migration costs, and integration service fees.

criteria.label: GDPR Compliance
criteria.description: Adherence to GDPR Article 28 and availability of necessary data processing agreements.

criteria.label: Data Residency
criteria.description: Requirement for data to be hosted within the EU, specifically Frankfurt or similar jurisdictions.

criteria.label: Vendor Stability
criteria.description: Assessment of vendor financial health and long-term viability to support the consultancy.

criteria.label: Sustainability Credentials
criteria.description: Alignment with ESG standards and transparency regarding the vendor's own environmental impact.
